required_preferences.fact: Spends daily in-person time with her parents during their extended stays, replacing weekly video calls — only sets up video calls when they are traveling or not in Chicago

supersedes.fact: Reserves video calls with parents for Sunday evenings — never substitutes with text unless it's urgent

required_preferences.fact: Now participates in mandatory cross-functional project planning sessions scheduled in the mornings — no longer refuses meetings before 11am

supersedes.fact: Blocks calendar for deep work in the morning — never schedules meetings before 11am

required_preferences.fact: Limits social media use to 15 minutes per day — never allows push notifications
Frequently attends group outings and bridal party hangouts outside her usual social circle, including venue tours, decoration shopping, and celebratory dinners.
Prefers independent travel focused on art museums and local coffee shops — avoids large group tours or package vacations
Limits hosting non-family guests or brunches while parents are in residence and prioritizes shared meals with them instead

persona: A recent MBA graduate specializing in business intelligence and analytics
